# MCP Playground Monorepo

> An interactive AI Agent Playground monorepo. It features a headless pure-Dart core package (`mcp_playground_dart`) and an interactive Flutter UI widget package (`mcp_playground_flutter`) side-by-side to prototype, debug, and run agentic Model Context Protocol (MCP) workflows.

## Docs

- [Full Documentation for LLMs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lschaffer/mcp_playground/main/llms-full.txt): All documentation inlined in a single file for LLM consumption

## Core Packages

### 1. [`mcp_playground_dart`](mcp_playground_dart) (Headless Core)
- [mcp_playground_dart/lib/src/llm/llm_service.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/mcp_playground_dart/lib/src/llm/llm_service.dart): LLM provider adapters (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, and embedded handlers).
- [mcp_playground_dart/lib/src/llm/llm_response.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/mcp_playground_dart/lib/src/llm/llm_response.dart): Common LLM request and stream chunk schemas.
- [mcp_playground_dart/lib/src/agents/agents_engine.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/mcp_playground_dart/lib/src/agents/agents_engine.dart): Monolithic execution loop with multi-prompt piping, tool loop, and events stream.
- [mcp_playground_dart/lib/src/mcp/mcp_client.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/mcp_playground_dart/lib/src/mcp/mcp_client.dart): HTTP/SSE and stdio subprocess client transport handlers.

### 2. [`mcp_playground_flutter`](mcp_playground_flutter) (Flutter UI Layer)
- [mcp_playground_flutter/lib/mcp_playground.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/mcp_playground_flutter/lib/mcp_playground.dart): Main playground widget and visual chat layouts.
- [mcp_playground_flutter/lib/playground_controller.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/mcp_playground_flutter/lib/playground_controller.dart): State manager orchestrating agent runs, FFI delegates binding, and persistence.

## Examples & Demos

- [examples/dart/embedded_example/main.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/examples/dart/embedded_example/main.dart): Console app executing `llamadart` GGUF model offline on the CPU, running native weather tools, and streaming tokens.
- [examples/dart/cli_example/main.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/examples/dart/cli_example/main.dart): CLI chat agent for multi-turn local Node/Python subprocess MCP server runs.
- [examples/dart/local_filesystem_example/main.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/examples/dart/local_filesystem_example/main.dart): Headless agent running `@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem` to inspect filesystem.
- [examples/flutter/example_embedded/lib/main.dart](file:///c:/projects/ls/mcp_playground/examples/flutter/example_embedded/lib/main.dart): Flutter app pre-configured for offline FFI `llamadart` model execution.
